name: AnalysisDecomposedLoad.AnalysisDecomposedLoadDirectionEnum
summary: Defines the analysis decomposed load directions.

enum_values.name: X
enum_values.summary: The analysis decomposed load direction is in the direction of the X-axis.

enum_values.name: Y
enum_values.summary: The analysis decomposed load direction is in the direction of the Y-axis.

enum_values.name: Z
enum_values.summary: The analysis decomposed load direction is in the direction of the Z-axis.

enum_values.name: RX
enum_values.summary: The analysis decomposed load direction is in the rotation of the X-axis.

enum_values.name: RY
enum_values.summary: The analysis decomposed load direction is in the rotation of the Y-axis.

enum_values.name: RZ
enum_values.summary: The analysis decomposed load direction is in the rotation of the Z-axis.
